productName: Tasty Terps - TC CART 1g - Blueberry Yum Yum - 1g
description: A convenient hybrid cartridge carrying Blueberry Yum Yum's character into flavorful, on-demand vapor — discreet, simple, and ready to go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of blueberry, mint, and berry, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
